scripts.build:libs: cd angular-libs && npx ng build ngx-mfe-broker --configuration production && npx ng build mfe-state-model --configuration production
scripts.start: concurrently -n menu,toolbar,overview,reports,analytics,export,shell -c cyan,blue,magenta,yellow,green,red,white "npm run start --workspace=angular-menu" "npm run start --workspace=angular-toolbar" "npm run start --workspace=angular-overview" "npm run start --workspace=angular-reports" "npm run start --workspace=angular-analytics" "npm run start --workspace=angular-export" "npm run start --workspace=angular-shell"
scripts.dev: npm run build:libs && npm run start
scripts.clean:nf: rm -rf angular-shell/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-menu/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-toolbar/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-overview/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-reports/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-analytics/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-export/node_modules/.cache/native-federation angular-shell/dist angular-menu/dist angular-toolbar/dist angular-overview/dist angular-reports/dist angular-analytics/dist angular-export/dist
scripts.dev:clean: npm run build:libs && npm run clean:nf && npm run start
